name: Bacon Cheese Ball
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook bacon until crispy. Drain and crumble the cooked bacon.
2. Combine the crumbled bacon with softened cream cheese, shredded cheddar cheese, onion powder, garlic powder, and Worcestershire sauce in a bowl. Mix well.
3. Form the mixture into a ball.
4. Roll the ball in chopped nuts.
